mapper.sql: t.*, u.name AS assignee_name, k.name AS kpi_name, k.unit AS kpi_unit, k.kpi_type AS kpi_type
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task (project_id, title, description, assignee_id, status, priority, kpi_id, kpi_contribution, due_date, estimated_hours, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{assigneeId}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{kpiId}, #{kpiContribution}, #{dueDate}, #{estimatedHours}, #{sortOrder}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM task t LEFT JOIN users u ON t.assignee_id = u.id LEFT JOIN kpi k ON t.kpi_id = k.id WHERE t.id = #{id}

SELECT u.id AS userId, u.name AS userName, COUNT(t.id) AS totalTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'DONE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS doneTasks, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status != 'DONE' AND t.due_date < CURRENT_DATE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdueTasks, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.status != 'DONE' THEN t.estimated_hours ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingHours FROM users u INNER JOIN membership m ON u.id = m.user_id LEFT JOIN task t ON t.assignee_id = u.id LEFT JOIN project p ON t.project_id = p.id AND p.org_id = #{orgId} WHERE m.org_id = #{orgId} GROUP BY u.id, u.name ORDER BY overdueTasks DESC, pendingHours DESC

SELECT FROM task t LEFT JOIN users u ON t.assignee_id = u.id LEFT JOIN kpi k ON t.kpi_id = k.id WHERE t.assignee_id = #{assigneeId} AND t.status != 'DONE' ORDER BY CASE t.priority WHEN 'P1' THEN 1 WHEN 'P2' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, t.due_date ASC NULLS LAST, t.id DESC
SELECT FROM task t LEFT JOIN users u ON t.assignee_id = u.id LEFT JOIN kpi k ON t.kpi_id = k.id WHERE t.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY t.status, t.sort_order, t.id

SELECT CAST(t.updated_at AS DATE) AS DONE_DATE, COUNT(*) AS DONE_COUNT FROM task t INNER JOIN project p ON t.project_id = p.id WHERE p.org_id = #{orgId} AND t.status = 'DONE' AND CAST(t.updated_at AS DATE) >= #{startDate} AND CAST(t.updated_at AS DATE) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY CAST(t.updated_at AS DATE) ORDER BY DONE_DATE
mapper.update: UPDATE task SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, status = #{status}, priority = #{priority}, kpi_id = #{kpiId}, kpi_contribution = #{kpiContribution}, due_date = #{dueDate}, estimated_hours = #{estimatedHours}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE task SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
